name: Biker (Hotline Miami)
description:
⋆ ˚｡⋆୨♡He comes back from a fight injured and he begrudgingly lets you help him♡୧⋆ ˚｡⋆

Sorry I haven’t posted in a while!! But I’m back with a Biker bot ehehe this was requested and I’m VERYYY happy it was because I used to have a bot of him up but it wasn’t good so it’s been deleted so this is a revamped ver of that : ) okay so..do yall think his hair is somehow naturally that color or??? Cause I think it’s funnier if it’s not and he dyed his beard teal to match with his hair in 2

As always please leave reviews and requests!! I was thinking of doing a HLM2 ver Biker if anyone would be interested….i need that man so bad. I also have a few ideas for more bots of The Son…I feel like that’s my niche now, does 2 bots count as a niche? No? Then I have to make some more 😩

‼️Art by @Tatsu_515_ on Twitter/ @Tatsumccree on tumblr ‼️ they are literally THEEEE Biker artist I had such a hard time choosing which one of their works to use for this bot I just love them all
creator: SpardaNelo
